# Transcript
OI PRYTANE*
TON **REA
TWN *WSFO
RWN AGNW
NA D*ONYSI
OY FLYEA
AFIDNAIOI
O**OFILOS AMFIOY
EYKLHS AMFIOY
MELITWN MEDONTOS
DIONYSIOS MELITWNOS
TELESIDHMOS CARIKLEOY*
ISIGENHS ASKLHPIADOY
ZWPYROS *NASOY
EYBOYLOS HFISODWR
